name: Mandarin Cherry Eggnog Ring
recipeIngredient: 1 package (85 g) Jell-O cherry jelly powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Begin with an eggnog base under a glistening red crown filled with mandarin oranges and grapes.
2. Drain the mandarin orange segments.
3. Dissolve the cherry Jell-O powder in 1 cup boiling water. Add cold water. Chill until slightly thickened.
4. Add mandolin-sliced mandarin oranges and halved green grapes. Spoon into a jelly mould.
5. Chill until set but not firm; the surface should be sticky when adding the second layer.
6. Meanwhile, dissolve the lemon Jell-O powder in 1 cup boiling water. Cool slightly.
7. Add eggnog and rum to the mixture. Chill until slightly thickened.
8. Prepare Dream Whip as directed on the package; reserve 1 cup.
9. Fold the chilled Dream Whip into the remaining Dream Whip.
10. Spoon over the fruit jelly layer in the mould.
11. Chill until set, 4 hours or overnight.
12. Unmould onto a chilled serving plate. Garnish with remaining Dream Whip if desired. Makes 10 servings.
